column1: # Partition table for ESP32-S3 – 16 MB flash (128 Mbit)
# Factory offset : starts at 0x10000 (after bootloader + partition table)
#   otadata    :  8 KB  – OTA selection (which app slot is active)
#   factory    :  0 KB  – Not used; OTA boots from ota_0 / ota_1
#   ota_1      :  4 MB  – Secondary application slot (receives OTA image)
#   spiffs     :  7.9 MB – Remaining flash for web assets / user data
